sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:01 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
route=load('governance/state/bem840_route_after_bem839_mobile_only.json')
status_in=route.get('status')
created_files=[]
if status_in=='repair_dispatch_result_proof':
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_self_dispatch_mobile_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 mobile-only repair: prove dispatch result writer without operator UI','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='self_dispatch_probe_queued_mobile_only'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify dispatch result proof'
elif status_in=='repair_claude_runtime_proof':
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_claude_runtime_mobile_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 mobile-only repair: prove Claude runtime state without operator UI','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='claude_runtime_probe_queued_mobile_only'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify runtime state'
elif status_in=='repair_real_claude_response_proof':
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_claude_response_mobile_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 mobile-only repair: force real Claude response without operator relay','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='claude_response_probe_queued_mobile_only'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify real Claude response'
elif status_in=='triad_present_process_protocol':
    status='triad_present_processing_required'
    next_action='process real Claude response into agreed protocol'
else:
    status='unknown_route_not_executed'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-840 route'
state={'bem':'BEM-841','status':status,'input_status':status_in,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'operator_device_assumption':'mobile_only','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem841_execute_mobile_only_next.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem841_execute_mobile_only_next.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Execute Mobile Only Next | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator mobile-only; no GitHub UI/computer instructions.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-841'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator mobile-only.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem841_execute_mobile_only_next.json','governance/reports/bem841_execute_mobile_only_next.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed the mobile-only next step by queuing the required proof repair without asking the operator for UI or computer actions')
